title: Five Augustana Students Honored With 2026 Covenant Awards
summary_en: Five Augustana University students received Covenant Awards on Thursday, April 30, during a celebration in Hamre Recital Hall. The Covenant Awards lift up those who exemplify Augustana’s core values: Christian, Liberal Arts, Excellence, Community and Service.
title_cn: 奥古斯塔纳大学5名学生获颁2026年度圣约奖
